data.body:
=== SESSION HANDOFF (post-migration hardening) ===
PUSHED: origin/main @ a713b76c (local == origin, clean tree). The bash->Python migration is COMPLETE and closed (adult-oxide-slave / lad-cipher-arena / nervy-hold-dip all closed; rebar is one Python implementation behind three facades, zero bash dependency).

THIS EPIC (mean-axe-feign) — 5 child tasks:
- (a) 5ab2 CI/lint/format — DONE/CLOSED. The full recommended ruff set [E,F,W,I,UP,B] now GATES with zero violations; ruff format applied + 'ruff format --check' gates in CI; the integration tier ('pytest -m integration') is wired into CI; bash/jq de-staled from the workflow. (Commits 89f5c7de, 7480964c, e31d4dd2, 670957ac.)
- (b) 4168-c28e-6505-406d Mutation testing — OPEN. Stand up mutmut or cosmic-ray over src/rebar core; record a baseline mutation score; identify + prune change-detector tests (assertion-light / tautological / implementation-pinned); kill high-value surviving mutants.
- (c) e143-31fd-bf2f-458e Full 3-interface coverage — OPEN. Map behaviors/integrations/contracts (internal + external) x {MCP, CLI, lib}; close gaps; external contracts = Jira reconciler bidirectional field round-trips (LIVE DIG authorized: bridge-probe / reconcile dry-run are non-destructive) + MCP outputSchema for every advertised command. INCLUDES roam-crone-disco (60a0-3aee-98e8-4094): author + register output schemas for sign / verify-signature (--output json) and remove the _OUTPUT_SCHEMA_GAPS exclusion in tests/interfaces/test_schema_coverage.py.
- (d) cf14-d845-075a-4f74 Test reorg along seams — OPEN. Each test file manageable; each directory 6-12 files (HARD CAP 24); subdirectories along logical seams; green locally + CI; maintain test isolation (verify order-independence).
- (e) 6623-726e-980e-4ace Opus SDET review loop — OPEN. Prime an opus subagent as an SDET; review the testing; remediate important/critical findings; REPEAT until none remain.

STATE / ENV: full non-integration suite 1688 passed/0 failed; integration 8 passed; ruff check (full set) + ruff format --check clean. Dev venv /tmp/rebar-dev; always a fixed --basetemp (macOS tmp race). DON'T git-commit while a background full-suite runs (trips _no_repo_commits). CI = .github/workflows/test.yml (lint job: ruff check + ruff format --check + mypy core gating; test job: broad + integration matrix).

PATTERN (worked well): use an opus subagent to IMPLEMENT a bounded sub-task (it runs the suite) and a SEPARATE opus subagent to REVIEW completed changes; inspect agent output + independently verify (suite + ruff + live DIG for Jira-touching changes) before committing. characterize->change->test-green->commit; full pytest green before each next step. Docs reflect CURRENT state (no migration-narration: surviving/retired/Tier E/no longer). Track all work in rebar; create+link discovered_from for emergent work. Commit to main directly; push when the user directs.
